additional_rules.description: Fabulous AUS Jumbo — in-house underwriting, AUS with overlays. Available in selected FL counties only.
additional_rules.arm_rate: 5% at par for 5/6 ARM if no LLPA (as of 01-28-2026)
additional_rules.detached_condo_only: Attached condos not eligible — detached condo only
additional_rules.no_subordination: No subordination allowed on subject property
additional_rules.small_balance_llpa: Price adj applies for loan amounts < $766,550

general_notes: GMCC Fabulous Jumbo is an AUS-based jumbo program available in selected Florida counties.
Eligible counties: Charlotte, DeSoto, Hillsborough, Lake, Manatee, Orange, Pasco, Pinellas, Polk, Sarasota.
Loan amount: $300K min, $1M max. Small balance LLPA applies below $766,550.
SFR, PUD, and detached condo only. Primary and 2nd home (no investment).
Purchase/R-T: max 80% LTV, min FICO 700. Cash-out: max 75% LTV, min FICO 720, primary only, max $200K.
In-house underwriting, AUS with overlays. Reserve based on DU/LP findings.
30-year fixed and ARM available. RSU income and self-employed borrowers OK.
Citizen and green card holders only. No subordination on subject.
Max DTI 45%. Non-occupant co-borrower allowed with blended ratio.
